title: Login with valid credentials
brief: Write a test case verifying that a registered user can log in with a correct email and password.
context: Login page has Email, Password fields and a Sign in button. On success the user lands on the dashboard.

title: Password reset via email link
brief: Write a test case for the 'Forgot password' flow where the user requests a reset link and sets a new password.
context: User enters their email, receives a reset link valid for 60 minutes, opens it, and submits a new password twice.

title: Add item to cart and change quantity
brief: Write a test case that adds a product to the cart and updates its quantity from 1 to 3.
context: Product page has an 'Add to cart' button. Cart shows quantity stepper and a recalculated subtotal.

title: Upload a profile photo within the size limit
brief: Write a test case for uploading a JPG profile photo under the 5 MB limit.
context: Profile settings allow JPG/PNG up to 5 MB. After upload the new photo replaces the old avatar.

title: Search products with a category filter
brief: Write a test case for searching 'shoes' and narrowing results with the 'Men' category filter.
context: Catalog page has a search box and category filters. Results update without a full page reload.

title: Registration rejects an invalid email format
brief: Write a negative test case verifying the registration form blocks an email without an @ symbol.
context: Registration form validates email format inline and shows an error message under the field.

title: Apply a valid discount coupon at checkout
brief: Write a test case for applying the coupon 'SAVE10' that gives a 10% discount at checkout.
context: Checkout has a coupon input and an 'Apply' button. The order total drops by 10% when a valid coupon is applied.

title: Change account email address
brief: Write a test case for updating the account email from the profile page, including the confirmation step.
context: Profile page lets the user enter a new email; a confirmation link is sent to the new address before the change takes effect.

title: Add to cart does nothing on mobile
brief: Write a bug report: tapping 'Add to cart' on a phone does not add the product and shows no feedback.
context: Happens on iPhone Safari, app version 3.4.1. The same action works on desktop Chrome.

title: App crashes uploading a large PDF
brief: Write a bug report: the app freezes and crashes when uploading a 12 MB PDF to a support ticket.
context: Stated limit is 20 MB. Smaller PDFs (2 MB) upload fine. Reproduced on Windows 11, Chrome 124.

title: Cart total wrong after removing an item
brief: Write a bug report: after removing one of three items, the cart total still includes the removed item's price.
context: Cart had 3 items totalling $90 ($30 each). After removing one, it shows $90 instead of $60.

title: Search returns results for an empty query
brief: Write a bug report: pressing Search with an empty field returns the entire product catalog instead of asking for input.
context: Expected behaviour is a validation message. Instead all 1,200 products load. Web app, Chrome 124.

title: Password reset email never arrives
brief: Write a bug report: requesting a password reset shows a success message but no email is delivered.
context: Tried twice, waited 15 minutes, checked spam. Account email is valid and receives other notifications.

title: Booking allows selecting a past date
brief: Write a bug report: the booking date picker lets the user pick yesterday and proceed to payment.
context: Only today or later should be selectable. Reproduced on the booking page, any browser.

title: Profile photo not updating after upload
brief: Write a bug report: after uploading a new avatar the old photo still shows until a hard refresh.
context: Upload reports success, but the header avatar keeps the previous image. Cache issue suspected.

title: Wrong currency symbol after switching language
brief: Write a bug report: switching the UI from English to German keeps prices in '$' instead of '€'.
context: Prices should localise to euro for the German locale. Numbers are correct, only the symbol is wrong.

title: Checkout discount eligibility
brief: Build a decision table for applying a discount at checkout.
context: Conditions: customer is a member (Yes/No) and order total is over $100 (Yes/No). Outcomes: 15% discount (member + over $100), 5% discount (member only), free shipping (over $100 only), no discount otherwise.

title: Login outcome
brief: Build a decision table for the result of a login attempt.
context: Conditions: password is correct (Yes/No), account is locked (Yes/No), 2FA is enabled (Yes/No). Outcomes include: access granted, prompt for 2FA code, access denied (wrong password), and account-locked message.

title: Loan application approval
brief: Build a decision table for an automated loan pre-approval.
context: Conditions: credit score above 700 (Yes/No), income verified (Yes/No), has collateral (Yes/No). Outcomes: approve, manual review, or reject.

title: Shipping cost rules
brief: Build a decision table for calculating shipping cost.
context: Conditions: order over $50 (Yes/No) and customer is a Prime member (Yes/No). Outcomes: free shipping, $2.99 shipping, or $5.99 shipping depending on the combination.

title: Feature access control
brief: Build a decision table for granting access to a beta feature.
context: Conditions: user is logged in (Yes/No), user has admin role (Yes/No), the beta feature flag is on (Yes/No). Outcomes: allow access, deny with upgrade prompt, or redirect to login.

title: Insurance premium tier
brief: Build a decision table for assigning an insurance premium tier.
context: Conditions: driver age over 25 (Yes/No) and at least one accident in the last year (Yes/No). Outcomes: low, standard, or high premium tier.

title: Test plan for a checkout & payment release
brief: Write a test plan for releasing a new checkout and card payment flow.
context: The release adds card payment, coupon codes, and order confirmation emails. Risk areas: payment failures, price calculation, and email delivery. One QA, two weeks before launch.

title: Test plan for mobile login & onboarding
brief: Write a test plan for a new mobile login and first-run onboarding flow.
context: Covers email/social login, 2FA, and a 3-step onboarding. Targets iOS and Android. Risk areas: 2FA, session handling, deep links.

title: Test plan for search & filters
brief: Write a test plan for a product search with category and price filters.
context: New feature on the web catalog. Risk areas: relevance, empty/edge queries, filter combinations, performance with large result sets.

title: Regression test plan for v2.0
brief: Write a regression test plan for a major v2.0 release.
context: v2.0 refactors the cart and account modules. Need to plan regression scope, entry/exit criteria, risks, and a one-week schedule with two testers.

title: Acceptance scenarios: user login
brief: Write Given/When/Then acceptance scenarios for user login.
context: Cover valid login, wrong password, and a locked account. Login page has email + password fields and a Sign in button.

title: Acceptance scenarios: add to cart
brief: Write Given/When/Then acceptance scenarios for adding a product to the cart.
context: From a product page; cover adding an in-stock item, an out-of-stock item, and updating quantity.

title: Acceptance scenarios: apply coupon
brief: Write Given/When/Then acceptance scenarios for applying a discount coupon at checkout.
context: Cover a valid coupon, an expired coupon, and a coupon below the minimum order value.

title: Acceptance scenarios: password reset
brief: Write Given/When/Then acceptance scenarios for the password reset flow.
context: Cover requesting a reset link, using a valid link, and using an expired link.

title: Summary: Sprint 12 regression cycle
brief: Write a test summary report and release recommendation for the Sprint 12 regression cycle.
context: Planned 120 tests, executed 118, 108 passed, 10 failed. Open defects: 3 major, 1 critical (payment timeout), 4 minor. Deadline is in 2 days.

title: Summary: Release 2.1 UAT
brief: Write a test summary report with a go/no-go recommendation for Release 2.1 UAT.
context: 80 acceptance cases, 78 passed, 2 failed (1 critical login defect, 1 cosmetic). Business wants to ship Friday.

title: Summary: mobile app smoke test
brief: Write a test summary report for a pre-release mobile smoke test.
context: 30 smoke tests across iOS and Android, 28 passed, 2 failed (Android push notifications, iOS deep link). No criticals.

title: Summary: payments API test cycle
brief: Write a test summary report for the payments API test cycle.
context: 150 API tests, 145 passed, 5 failed (3 timeouts under load, 2 schema mismatches). Performance risk under peak load remains.

title: Traceability: login requirements
brief: Build a requirements traceability matrix for the login feature.
context: Requirements: REQ-1 valid login succeeds, REQ-2 wrong password rejected, REQ-3 account locks after 5 attempts, REQ-4 2FA prompt when enabled. Trace each to test cases with a status.

title: Traceability: checkout requirements
brief: Build a requirements traceability matrix for checkout.
context: Requirements: REQ-1 cart total is correct, REQ-2 valid coupon applies discount, REQ-3 payment success shows confirmation, REQ-4 payment failure shows an error. Map each to tests and a status.

title: Traceability: registration requirements
brief: Build a requirements traceability matrix for the registration form.
context: Requirements: REQ-1 valid signup creates an account, REQ-2 invalid email is rejected, REQ-3 weak password is rejected, REQ-4 duplicate email is rejected. Trace to tests with status.

title: Traceability: search requirements
brief: Build a requirements traceability matrix for product search.
context: Requirements: REQ-1 keyword returns relevant results, REQ-2 empty query is handled, REQ-3 filters narrow results, REQ-4 no-results state is shown. Map each to tests and a status.

title: Checklist: login form
brief: Write a test checklist for a login form.
context: Fields: email, password, Sign in button, 'Forgot password' link. Consider valid login, wrong password, empty fields, invalid email format, and account lockout.

title: Checklist: file upload
brief: Write a test checklist for an avatar/file upload feature.
context: Accepts JPG/PNG up to 5 MB. Consider valid file, oversized file, wrong format, no file selected, and upload progress/feedback.

title: Checklist: responsive layout
brief: Write a test checklist for a page's responsive layout.
context: The product page must work on mobile, tablet, and desktop. Consider breakpoints, navigation/hamburger menu, image scaling, touch targets, and horizontal scrolling.

title: Checklist: checkout form
brief: Write a test checklist for a checkout form.
context: Fields: shipping address, card number, expiry, CVV, coupon code, Place order. Consider valid order, invalid card, expired card, missing required fields, and coupon application.
